programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson has his hands full when he's confronted by a tough little Blader named Daichi. Just as they're about to battle another mysterious Blader named Jin shows up and wants to challenge Tyson as well. All three Bladers mix it up but Ray puts a stop to the fight when he realizes that Tyson can't handle two Bladers at once.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Daichi continues to annoy Tyson with his constant battle challenges, which Tyson refuses to give in to - even after an embarrassing confrontation at the public swimming pool proves that Daichi is an impressive and highly skilled Beyblader.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson's alone and picking up the pieces of what used to be The Bladebreakers... Daichi won't leave him alone, and Kai is...well, Kai...at least he's got the championships to look forward too, right? Meanwhile, both Ray and Max are going through the growing pains of being part of a new team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: At the preliminaries for the World Championships, Daichi wins his matches easily, establishing himself as a new powerhouse on the Beyblading scene. Kenny also competes, defeating his opponents with such skill that even Tyson is impressed.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: There's only one round left in the tournament to decide who's going to partner up with Tyson in the World Beyblade Tag Team Championships and it's between Daichi and Kai.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Block A and Block B finals of the Beyblade World Championships are underway. Max wins his match and finds himself partnered with a real bully of a blader named Rick.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution Team heads to a remote training camp to prepare for the upcoming tournament. When they first arrive, Hiro tells Tyson that Kai has quit the team.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution team fly to New York City for the Beyblade World Championships. The normally feisty Daichi proves to be afraid of flying, and once in the city, he becomes overwhelmed by the size and scope of things in the Big Apple.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The teams have been selected and the finals are about to begin...Unfortunately Tyson finds himself facing all of his former friends...each part of a team that he will eventually have to 'blade against.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson blames his embarrassing loss to Ray on Daichi, telling the team he's better off competing alone. As Tyson runs away, the US Finals continue with Rick of the PPB All Starz against Claude of Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The Beyblade World Tag Team Championships are about to start in Rome as Barthez busily prepares his team for the big event. He's even invited a television news crew to document his efforts as a coach.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Tyson gets in a huff and leaves the team after he is dropped from the lineup against the Blitzkrieg Boys. This leaves Kenny and Daichi to pick up the slack against their opponents.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: In the second of a best of three match, Tala thinks he's broken Kenny down, but Kenny summons his inner strength and attacks with all of his combined power. Unfortunately, it's not enough, and Tala shatters Kenny's Hopper into pieces with his Novae Rog attack.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: In Madrid for the Spanish leg of the World Championships, the hard-of-sleeping Lee has a nightmare that Ray kicks him off the team for his poor play. The day before their next match, White Tiger X encounters a pair of beyblading jugglers in Madrid's main square, who also happen to be trick bladers.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: As Max prepares to face Kai in the next round, the members of BBA Revolution overhear a confrontation between Johnny and Robert of the Majestics and Barthez Battalion.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: The BBA Revolution are slated to face the sneaky Barthez Battalion, but while Hilary and Kenny want to report their dirty deeds to the authorities, Tyson believes the best way to teach them a lesson is to beat them fair and square...But that's before he really sees how low the team will sink to win.

programme.title: Beyblade
programme.desc: Our heroes land in Egypt for the next leg of the tournament where the first two teams going up against each other are the Blitzkrieg Boys against the Barthez Battalion. But as Barthez readies his team, we learn he's devised a special spider web-like tape that is supposed to shoot out of his team's blades and trap their opponents in an inescapable web.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: S1:E22 The Underground | The Cook | A Building Site | The Lawnmower - Bernard is a hapless anthropomorphic polar bear who always tries to fix the troubles that regularly occur in each episode, but only succeeds in doing even worse damage, often even physically hurting himself. The character does not speak, but expresses himself with gestures and noises.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: S1:E23 Opera | The Photobooth | The Zoo | Close Encounters 3 - Bernard is a hapless anthropomorphic polar bear who always tries to fix the troubles that regularly occur in each episode, but only succeeds in doing even worse damage, often even physically hurting himself. The character does not speak, but expresses himself with gestures and noises.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: S1:E24 Boy Scout 2 | The TV Aerial | Merry Christmas | Birthday - Bernard is a hapless anthropomorphic polar bear who always tries to fix the troubles that regularly occur in each episode, but only succeeds in doing even worse damage, often even physically hurting himself. The character does not speak, but expresses himself with gestures and noises.

programme.title: Mosley
programme.desc: To save his family, Mosley, must embark on an epic journey to find the legendary Uprights... but what he unexpectedly finds will unlock a secret revealing his true nature. With large and layered themes, Mosley tells a timeless adventurous tale of family, love and hope!

programme.title: Ghoster
programme.desc: An inquisitive girl and her father must unravel the secrets of Echoville Manor which has held the world's cutest spirit Ghoster captive for 50 years, before Yuto the ghost dragon wipes them all out in his quest for immortality.

programme.title: The Little Mermaid
programme.desc: In this "half-fish" out-of-water animated adventure, a mermaid princess makes a bargain with a sea witch to become human.

programme.title: Ghosthunters: On Icy Trails
programme.desc: When the often-fearful eleven-year-old Tom discovers a slimy green ghost in his cellar called Hugo, he is understandably afraid. However, Tom soon realises that Hugo, who is an ASG (Averagely Spooky Ghost), is not only completely harmless but also desperately in need of his help.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students.

programme.title: Overboard
programme.desc: Unjustly fired by a spoilt and selfish yacht owner, Kate gets payback when he falls overboard and wakes up with amnesia...

programme.title: The King Of Comedy
programme.desc: A struggling comedian gambles his uncertain future on a crazy scheme to ransom his way onto television by kidnapping a popular talk show host.

programme.title: Turbulence
programme.desc: (2016) High-flying action with Dina Meyer, Victoria Pratt and Justin Johnson Cortez. An FBI agent's flight is about to get bumpy as her mysterious seat mate forces her to make a life-or-death choice.

programme.title: Miami Magma
programme.desc: A volcano expert and her sister have to try and shut-down an illegal oil drilling operation.

programme.title: 10,000 Days
programme.desc: After a comet hits the Earth turning it into a global wasteland, two families struggle to survive. Starring John Schneider and Peter Wingfield (2014).

programme.title: Shockwave: Countdown to Disaster
programme.desc: When a stolen seismic weapon is activated, a respected geophysicist warns of the potentially devastating global consequences. Stars Stacey Oristano, Rib Hillis (2017)

programme.title: Kill Command
programme.desc: A team of marines attempt to survive after a training mission against warfare A.I. goes wrong. Starring Thure Lindhardt and Vanessa Kirby (2016)

programme.title: I Feel Pretty
programme.desc: A woman struggling with insecurity wakes from a fall believing she is the most beautiful woman on the planet. Her new confidence empowers her to live fearlessly, but what happens when she realizes her appearance never changed?

programme.title: Takers
programme.desc: A Manhattan detective is pitted against a young crew that specializes in elaborate heists...

programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: One thousand years after cataclysmic events forced humanity's escape from Earth, Nova Prime has become mankind's new home. Legendary General Cypher Raige returns from an extended tour of duty to his estranged family, ready to be a father to his 13-year-old son, Kitai.

programme.title: Max Steel
programme.desc: Based on the popular line of Mattel toys and the hit TV series, "Max Steel" is a teenage superhero for the next generation, combining action, comedy, and cutting edge special effects into an epic adventure for the whole family.

programme.title: Righteous Kill
programme.desc: The story begins with highly decorated Detectives Turk and Rooster of the NYPD facing a retirement which neither of them are ready for. Before they can hang up their badges, they are called to investigate the murder of a notorious pimp, who appears to have ties to a case they solved years before.

programme.title: Detective McLean
programme.desc: The complicated relationship between two brothers clouds an investigation for Allison and Devin. When Matt takes Allison on a romantic date, Cameron and Mariah break house rules challenging Rachel and Jeff.

programme.title: Detective McLean
programme.desc: Allison and Devin investigate the breakdown of a star student at the high school and the teens deal with the social fallout of having Allison on campus.

programme.title: Adventure Boyz
programme.desc: When England's largest castle is robbed by a notorious crime boss (Jon Campling, Harry Potter's Death Eater), the last thing he and his criminal gang expected to be up against were two boys on BMX and their speedway racing dad.

programme.title: The Fortress
programme.desc: From the mastermind behind Squid Game. The fate of a nation is at stake in this lavish historical war epic. Based on the 17th century Chinese invasion of Korea and its subsequent subjugation of the royal court. 1636, Korea's Joseon kingdom is invaded by a Chinese army aligned with the Manchu Qing dynasty. King Injo and his men take refuge in a mountain fortress, but the bitter feud continues.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Big Mommas House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: George And The Dragon
programme.desc: A knight (James Purefoy, "Rome") returning from the Crusades takes on a dragon after the disappearance of the kindly Princess Lunna (Piper Perabo, "Coyote Ugly"). With Patrick Swayze.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: Notorious assassin Elektra unwittingly takes part in her former teacher's test when she protects a former target and his daughter from "The Hand," a sinister crime syndicate of martial arts fighters.

programme.title: I Am Soldier
programme.desc: With the toughest selection process in the British army, does a chef have what it takes to join the S.A.S.?

programme.title: Patriots Day
programme.desc: Chronicles the courage and power of the people of Boston during the manhunt for the Boston Marathon bombers.

programme.title: American Assassin
programme.desc: A CIA black-ops recruit uses his lethal skills to try and stop a rogue operative with a deadly agenda.

programme.title: I Am Soldier
programme.desc: With the toughest selection process in the British army, does a chef have what it takes to join the S.A.S.?

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: For the Love of Benji
programme.desc: Benji is on holiday with his family in Greece, but after getting separated at the airport, he finds himself on another exciting adventure, now on the run from international spies!

programme.title: G-Loc
programme.desc: In a world on the brink of environmental collapse, mass migration to neighbouring planet, Rhea, is humanity's final hope for survival. The only problem is, in the sixteen Earth years since the first humans landed on Rhea, two hundred and eighty-eight years have passed on the new planet and the existing population are no longer welcoming new arrivals, with the Rheans having set up a space blockade to shot down any ship that tries to cross into their territory. 'Earther', Bran, has big dreams of a better life in this new world, but the odds are stacked against him. Finding himself the lone survivor of a failed emigration attempt, his escape pod floats mindlessly in space and his oxygen is running low. His only chance of survival is to hook up to a rogue Rhean supply ship called The Nysa running on auxiliary power. But after finding the crew on board The Nysa dead, it seems Bran may have more than just a hostile planet to worry about. An intense interstellar thriller with an impressive cast, including Stephen Moyer (True Blood), Casper Van Dien (Starship Troopers) and John Rhys-Davies (the Indiana Jones and Lord of the Rings franchises).

programme.title: Pennywise: The Story of It
programme.desc: Exploring the 1990 mini-series, based on Stephen King's iconic novel IT, this documentary tells a story heard by few and showcases a wealth of behind-the-scenes footage and photos seen by even fewer. From investigating the cultural phenomenon of coulrophobia (the fear of clowns) to Tim Curry's magical portrayal of the notorious clown monster, this story promises to dig deeper into the Pennywise phenomenon than ever before! Featuring interviews with many of the cult classic's key players, including director Tommy Lee Wallace and cast members Tim Curry, Seth Green, and Richard Thomas.

programme.title: Poster Boys
programme.desc: When broke Irishman, Al Clancy, mistakenly agrees to mind his smart-ass 10-year-old nephew, Karl, for a week, his job and home are placed in jeopardy. In a bold bid to save Al's unfulfilling but undemanding job as a poster boy, they steal the family camper-van, embarking on a madcap, impulsive postering tour across Ireland. But the unlikely pair soon discover it may be more difficult than they realised to survive a week in each other's company... An "Irish gem that will have you in stitches" (Film Ireland), this semi-autobiographical comedy from debut Director Dave Minogue received its world premiere at this year's Galway Film Fleadh. An independent production featuring a range of brilliant new Irish talent (and a memorable cameo from Boyzone/Corrie's Keith Duffy!), this festival favourite is a road-trip adventure with undeniable heart and an uplifting message at its core that families need to look out for each other no matter what circumstances they may find themselves in.

programme.title: Crash and Burn
programme.desc: The iconic true story of legendary Tommy Byrne- the worlds greatest racing car driver equivalent of George Best and Muhammad Ali rolled into one. The only thing standing in the way of fame and fortune was Tommys own hedonistic lifestyle sex, drugs and fast cars. Experience the remarkable life of the only racing driver Senna ever feared. His rise was meteoric and his fall spectacular

programme.title: Mr. Jones
programme.desc: A highly-compelling political thriller from award-winning director Agniezka Holland. Welsh journalist Gareth Jones (James Norton: Little Women) risks his life to expose the truth about the devastating famine in the Soviet Union in the early 1930s. Also starring Vanessa Kirby (The Crown) and Golden Globe Nominee Peter Sarsgaard (The Batman). This is the most important true story you will ever see.

programme.title: Predestination
programme.desc: A slick, sci-fi thriller brought to you by the directors of Daybreakers, chronicles the life of a Temporal Agent (Ethan Hawke) sent on an intricate series of time-travelling missions. For his final assignment he must pursue the one criminal that has eluded him throughout time. Starring Sarah Snook (Jessabelle) and Noah Taylor (Vanilla Sky). A unique and mind-bending exploration.

programme.title: Samurai Marathon
programme.desc: From the team behind 13 Assassins this sword slasher is inspired by a real-life race! In the late feudal era of Japan, a young ninja is operating undercover in the court of an ageing Lord. When the Lord challenges his lazy samurais to a punishing marathon, the ninja's loyalties are put to the test. Directed by Bernard Rose (Candyman) and boasting a breath-taking Philip Glass soundtrack.

programme.title: A Love to Remember
programme.desc: Tenley builds up the courage to ask out her online crush, Jared. With a series of misunderstands, will she be able to keep up the lie of their relationship and help save his business? (2020)

programme.title: Brimming With Love
programme.desc: Stuck in a newspaper sales department, Allie (Kelsey Asbille) is thrilled when her boss, Mr. Rickford (George Newbern) gives her a chance at writing her own summer series of articles.

programme.title: An Hour Behind
programme.desc: Bakery store owner Trish reluctantly agrees to go on a blind date. (2017)

programme.title: Accidentally In Love
programme.desc: Edie finds true love in London just days before she is to return to the US. They are separated, but as fate would have it, they reunite 6 years later in the US.

programme.title: Just for the Summer
programme.desc: Teacher Penelope Campbell loves visiting her Grandma Dot every summer – despite her constant attempts to find Penelope a man! This year, she bumps into her childhood sweetheart Jason Humphrey, who explains his grandmother is desperate to pair him off, too.

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley's brilliant at organizing other people's engagements, but unlucky in finding romance herself. When designing her most important proposal yet, the man who could jeopardize it all may be the one who helps find her own love story.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: When Seattle interior designer Lily Summers returns to her hometown to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast, she meets Marcus, the handsome seaplane pilot whose life's work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: Mr. Morgan's Last Love
programme.desc: From the day Pauline (Clemence Poésy) lends him a helping hand on the bus, the stubborn and weary Matthew Morgan (Sir Michael Caine) stumbles back to happiness.

programme.title: Life With Music
programme.desc: In this life affirming story of hope, struggling pianist finds inspiration with a free-spirited music critic.

programme.title: The Loss Adjuster
programme.desc: Hapless Insurance Loss Adjuster - Martin Dyer - feels his life is spiralling out of control but discovers that even when you reach rock bottom, that some clouds really do have a silver lining.

programme.title: In A Day
programme.desc: A young woman spends a curiously unpredictable day with a stranger.

programme.title: A Time To Dance
programme.desc: John and Abby may have been the perfect couple, but not anymore. When their daughter surprises them with her engagement, their divorce is put on hold. Will the romance surrounding the wedding be enough to rekindle what they have lost?

programme.title: Modern Persuasion
programme.desc: A sexy, modern telling of Jane Austen's "Persuasion." Wren (Alicia Witt: Orange is the New Black) is a happy, single and self-confessed workaholic who, after rising to the top of the corporate ladder, finds herself coming home to her cat every night.

programme.title: My Birthday Romance
programme.desc: A woman tired of her parents nagging her to find a boyfriend makes a deal with a guy who also doesn't want a relationship to pose as her boyfriend to keep her family off her back until after her birthday party.

programme.title: Love in Tahiti
programme.desc: Brielle has always believed the ocean floor is full of treasures just waiting to be found. Over the years she has dived to find coins, lost jewelry and more in the waters of Tahiti. Instead of profiting from them, she loves reuniting people with their lost valuables. When she finds a class ring and returns it to Marcus, a handsome US Navy serviceman, Brielle soon discovers what has been missing in her life – a treasure of the heart.

programme.title: Love, Lost & Found
programme.desc: Claire gets a surprise proposal on a mountain hike with her boyfriend Joey but when they get separated, a rancher turns Claire's head and a park ranger makes Joey see they're made for each other.

programme.title: Cinderella in the Caribbean
programme.desc: Ashlyn Vanderbilt travels with her stepmother Miriam and her fiancé Bruce for their destination wedding. Although Ashlyn finds friendship and love with Bruce's son, Noah, she struggles to have her happily ever after when she discovers that her stepfamily plans to ruin Bruce.

programme.title: The Baby Proposal
programme.desc: Layla Bennett and Derek Dray are the hosts of Wake Up, Chicago and for the folks at home, their chemistry is undeniable. Derek is incredibly protective about the format of Wakeup, Chicago while Layla is always looking to shake things up. One morning they discover an adorable baby named Poppy left in a basket in Laylas dressing room. The mother passed away and the caretaker is unable to care for Poppy and is convinced that Layla and Derek will make perfect parents.

programme.title: Toxic Love
programme.desc: Tales of toxic love triangles.

programme.title: Kidnapped in Paradise
programme.desc: Savannah brings her husband and daughter back to her birthplace in Australia.

programme.title: Murder in Mexico: The Bruce Beresford-Redman Story
programme.desc: A producer for the show Survivor, takes his wife and their children on vacation.

programme.title: Trapped in the Farmhouse
programme.desc: A woman on the run from her abusive boyfriend seeks shelter in a farmhouse.

programme.title: Toxic Love
programme.desc: Tales of toxic love triangles.

programme.title: Game of Love
programme.desc: Ex-Wife Frances conspires with her grown children to force Jake to sell his cherished Seattle basketball team. Will game changing moves off the court help reignite romantic sparks?

programme.title: What Would Jesus Do? The Journey Continues
programme.desc: The journey continues from What Would Jesus Do? (2010) as the drifter arrives into a new town inspiring a group of people to live as Jesus would.

programme.title: Bad Date Chronicles
programme.desc: Jeri Jones runs the popular website ‘Bad Date Chronicles' where daters can go to anonymously post horrible date experiences. Realizing he's the subject of one of the posts, rival blogger Jack Collins dares Jeri to three dates in an attempt to prove he's not such a bad guy after all.

programme.title: The Great New Wonderful
programme.desc: The Great New Wonderful weaves five stories against the backdrop of an anxious and uncertain post-9-11 New York City.

programme.title: Hitch (2005)
programme.desc: New York "date doctor" Alex Hitchens (Will Smith) tries to charm gossip columnist Sara Melas (Eva Mendes) at the same time he is coaching shy Albert (Kevin James) on how to win the love of beautiful heiress Allegra Cole (Amber Valletta).

programme.title: Maid in Manhattan
programme.desc: A woman (Lopez) takes a job as a chambermaid at a luxury hotel in New York. She meets and falls in love with a debonair heir to an America political dynasty (Fiennes), who mistakes her for a society woman. When her real identity is revealed, the truth sets in about the disparity of their lives.

programme.title: The Wedding Ringer
programme.desc: After a barbershop manager advises his best friend to break off his engagement, he unexpectedly falls in love with the jilted fiancee, testing both his new romance and his friendship.

programme.title: The Wedding Ringer
programme.desc: After a barbershop manager advises his best friend to break off his engagement, he unexpectedly falls in love with the jilted fiancee, testing both his new romance and his friendship.

programme.title: Seven Alone
programme.desc: A frontier family crosses the U.S. by wagon train, hoping for a better life in the Oregon Territory.

programme.title: Savage Land
programme.desc: When John Peterson finds his dead family he decides to take up the hunt for the perpetrators and take revenge on them.

programme.title: I Am Sartana, Trade Your Guns for a Coffin
programme.desc: Sartana, a bounty hunter and gunfighter, witnesses a gold robbery and arrives in a suspicious town run by Samuel Spencer. Hired to protect the next shipment, Sartana fends off numerous incompetent villains, surviving their attempts on his life. Meanwhile, his nemesis, Sabbath—known for his white coat and parasol—arrives in town. With tensions rising, Sartana and Sabbath are headed for a final showdown to settle the score.

programme.title: Three Bullets ... For a Long Gun
programme.desc: Nobody knows his true name, but everybody knows he is the Major, and that when he wants something, he gets it.

programme.title: White Apache
programme.desc: Outlaws attack a band of settlers and kill everyone except a pregnant woman who's rescued by a band of Indians. The woman dies giving birth but Chief White Bear adopts her male baby, naming him "Shining Sky," and raising him as brother to his own son, Black Wolf.

programme.title: Hobson's Choice
programme.desc: Harry Hobson is a prosperous provincial bookmaker. He is a widower and his home and business are looked after by his three daughters. Hobson is a contented man and has decided that although he will allow his two younger daughters to marry, the eldest, Maggie, must stay at home and care for him. But Maggie has other ideas and is determined to force her father into letting her have her own way...

programme.title: Blithe Spirit
programme.desc: A harmless s√©ance summons up an unwanted ghost in this Noel Coward play.

programme.title: Heavens Above!
programme.desc: Amanda occasionally baby-sits for friends and neighbors, so when the newly-arrived couple in the village ask her to sit for them, she accepts.

programme.title: Make Mine Mink
programme.desc: A group of people lead by Major Rayne (Terry Thomas), hatch a plan to steal fur coats, sell them and give the money to charity. As a group, however, they are not particularly experienced in such matters.

programme.title: Skyman
programme.desc: The story of Carl who believes he experienced an alien encounter at 10-years-old and is now trying to reconnect with the UFO as the same location.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Riveting Sci-Fi action-thriller Push is set in a deadly world of psychic espionage where the ability to move objects using only the mind, see the future, create new realities and kill without ever touching the victim can turn a person into a lethal weapon - or a target.

programme.title: Meet Dave
programme.desc: Seeking a way to save their doomed world, a crew of tiny, human-looking aliens arrives on Earth in the perfect disguise--a spaceship shaped like an ordinary man.

programme.title: The Intergalactic Adventures of Max Cloud
programme.desc: When video-game enthusiast, Sarah (Isabelle Allen), is transported into her favorite game, she finds herself on an intergalactic prison, home to the most dangerous villains in the galaxy.

programme.title: Duplicate
programme.desc: Duplicate' is a twisty, mind-bending Freudian-fuelled science fiction story about a man who shares his body with his twin brother, stabilised by an experimental deep-brain stimulation device.

programme.title: Murder 101: If Wishes Were Horses
programme.desc: A criminology professor and a private detective work together to try and solve a disappearance.

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Framed For Murder

programme.title: Martha's Vineyard Mysteries: A Beautiful Place To Die
programme.desc: (2020) Thriller starring Jesse Metcalfe. A retired detective's quiet life is shattered when a body washes up to shore, but can he track down the murderer?

programme.title: Nocebo
programme.desc: (2022) Unsettling psychological thriller starring Eva Green. A fashion designer suffers from a puzzling illness that confounds her doctors - until a mysterious caregiver reveals a horrifying truth...

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: Chronicling the adventures of an eccentric, resilient and tight-knit family, THE GLASS CASTLE is a remarkable story of unconditional love.

programme.title: To The Wonder
programme.desc: After falling in love in Paris, Marina and Neil come to Oklahoma, where problems arise. Their church's Spanish-born pastor struggles with his faith, while Neil encounters a woman from his childhood.

programme.title: The Music of Silence
programme.desc: Before he was Andrea Bocelli, he was Amos Bardi. Based on a true story, Amos is born with the gift of superb quality of voice. From there, he begins a life studded with victories and becomes one of the most world-renowned opera singers.

programme.title: Bad Country
programme.desc: Bad Country concerns a veteran Baton Rouge detective who infiltrates the most powerful criminal enterprise in the South and, after taking down its top lieutenant and contract killer, convinces him to turn informant to help bring down the entire organization including its amoral leader.

programme.title: Kingsglaive: Final Fantasy XV
programme.desc: The magical kingdom of Lucis is home to the sacred Crystal, and the menacing empire of Niflheim is determined to steal it. King Regis of Lucis (Sean Bean) commands an elite force of soldiers called the Kingsglaive..

programme.desc: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, super-assassin accustomed to a life of flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a fun-loving computer tech, he finds true love… and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss.

programme.title: Vantage Point
programme.desc: The attempted assassination of the president is told from five different perspectives.

programme.title: S3 E1 Canvey Island to Rural Essex
programme.desc: Wayne and his family want a grand house in rural Essex with plenty of space inside for entertaining and plenty of room outside for a pool. The only condition is it must be within commuting distance of Canvey's football ground.
